description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe predominantly colored in faded red and white, featuring a classic retro design. The upper is constructed from a combination of mesh and synthetic leather, with white overlays and a red base. The shoe has a padded collar and tongue for ankle support, and the lacing system uses white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. Branding elements, including the 'PRO-SPECS' name and logo, are visible on the side, tongue, and heel. The shoe shows signs of wear, with visible scuff marks and discoloration, especially on the white areas. The overall structure appears intact, with the sole and upper still firmly attached.
description: A worn, high-top athletic shoe in faded red and white with visible branding and classic lacing, showing signs of use and scuffing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'PRO-SPECS' logo, white overlays, and the red mesh base with visible wear and scuffing.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, padded tongue with logo, and the rounded toe box with some discoloration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red and white color scheme, synthetic overlays, and the shoe's overall worn condition.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the 'PRO-SPECS' branding on the heel tab and the padded collar, with visible creasing and wear.
attribute_logo: Circular logo with a figure and text on the side, rectangular logo on the tongue, and 'PRO-SPECS' text on the heel, all in white.
